Short-term government bonds

The Spiko MMFs invest in short-term bonds issued by the United States (USD Fund) and countries of the Eurozone with the best credit ratings (EUR Fund).

100% onshore, fully regulated

The Spiko MMFs are authorized and supervised by the French Financial Markets Authority. The funds’ assets are held by CACEIS Bank, one of the world’s largest custodian bank.

Get your yield back

Don’t miss out on positive risk-free rates by keeping funds in bank deposits or stablecoins. Start earning the € or $ risk-free rates.

Invest from 1,000 EUR or 1,000 USD

You can invest in Spiko MMFs from 1,000 EUR or USD or the equivalent in stablecoins. You can then make as many deposits or withdrawals as you like starting from 1 EUR or USD. There is no limit on deposits or withdrawals.

Get your cash back at any time

Redemption orders are processed daily. You get your money back in 0 to 1 business days depending on your bank.

Available on your wallet

Your MMF shares are tokenized and can be custodied on the wallet of your choice. Don’t want to use your own wallet? No worries, we provide a default one to all investors.

We work with top institutions.

The Spiko MMFs are managed with top-tier regulated partners. Your money is held by one of the world’s largest custodian bank. It is never on Spiko’s balance sheet.

CACEIS

CACEIS Bank is the custodian of the funds’ assets. CACEIS is the asset servicing arm of Tier 1 banks Crédit Agricole and Santander.

Twenty First Capital

Twenty First Capital, an asset manager with over $2bn under management, manages the Funds’ portfolio.

PwC

PricewaterhouseCoopers is the qualified auditor of the Funds.

Trail of Bits

Trail of Bits audited the Funds’ smart contracts.

Spiko launches world’s first fully-licensed tokenized Money Market Funds on Ethereum and Polygon, and announces a 4M€ pre-seed round

Newsletter

Sign up to get the latest Spiko updates straight to your inbox.

Spiko Finance is a French Société par actions simplifiée registered at the Paris Trade Register (n° 980 659 585) and having its headquarters at 16 rue des Immeubles Industriels, 75011 Paris, France. Spiko Finance is a licensed financial investment advisor, registered with CNCGP, a professional association approved by the French Financial Markets Authority (AMF). Spiko Finance is registered with the French single register of insurance, banking, and finance intermediaries under number 23008251. This registration can be verified at www.orias.fr. All funds deposited by our customers are held in compliance with relevant legislation by our banking partner, CACEIS Bank, a subsidiary of the Crédit Agricole and Santander banking groups. These funds are never on the balance sheet of Spiko Finance.
